title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入拉脱维亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入拉脫維亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage documentation against Latvia (LVS/SPRK/AST) requirements for EU CE framework compliance (LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, RED 2014/53/EU, and Battery Regulation 2023/1542), transport, safety, grid interconnection, and destination-country due-diligence expectations, with Riga and Ventspils as the main ports.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与拉脱维亚（LVS/SPRK/AST）基于欧盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及欧盟电池法规2023/1542）、运输、安全、并网和尽责管理要求的差距对照，里加和文茨皮尔斯为主要入境港。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與拉脫維亞（LVS/SPRK/AST）基於歐盟CE框架（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、RED 2014/53/EU及歐盟電池法規2023/1542）、運輸、安全、併網和盡責管理要求的差距對照，里加和文茨皮爾斯為主要入境港。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Latvia (LVS/SPRK/AST) requirements, EU CE directives, grid requirements, and destination-country requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、危险货物分类、海关裁定、并网审批或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行拉脱维亚（LVS/SPRK/AST）及欧盟相关法规的要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、危險貨物分類、海關裁定、併網核准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行拉脫維亞（LVS/SPRK/AST）及歐盟相關法規的要求。

answer_first.en: For Latvia, the practical entry barriers are mainly EU CE conformity execution (LVD 2014/35/EU, EMC 2014/30/EU, RED 2014/53/EU where applicable, plus Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 lifecycle and due-diligence duties), SPRK/AST grid-interconnection documentation, and LVS/market-acceptance alignment. EU membership makes this a harmonised-framework-first market, with 230/400 V 50 Hz utility conditions (recently synchronised to the Continental European grid) and Riga or Ventspils as the principal import gateways.
answer_first.zh: 对于拉脱维亚，主要入门门槛是执行欧盟CE合规路径（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、必要时RED 2014/53/EU，以及欧盟电池法规2023/1542的生命周期与尽责管理义务）、SPRK/AST并网文件要求，以及LVS与市场验收衔接。该市场以欧盟协调框架为主，电网名义电压为230/400 V、50 Hz（已近期同步至欧洲大陆电网），且里加或文茨皮尔斯是主要入境口岸。
answer_first.zht: 對於拉脫維亞，主要入門門檻是執行歐盟CE合規路徑（LVD 2014/35/EU、EMC 2014/30/EU、必要時RED 2014/53/EU，以及歐盟電池法規2023/1542之生命週期與盡責管理義務）、SPRK/AST併網文件要求，以及LVS與市場驗收接軌。該市場以歐盟協調框架為主，電網名義電壓為230/400 V、50 Hz（已近期同步至歐洲大陸電網），且里加或文茨皮爾斯為主要入境口岸。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
